architecture.description: Zero-shot text-to-speech speaker cloning model supporting 17 languages, including English and Hindi, from a short 3-10 second audio prompt.
architecture.voice_cloning_type: Zero-shot cloning (requires no fine-tuning or voice training at runtime)

hindi_hinglish_support.hinglish_handling: Since Hinglish uses mixed grammar and vocabulary, it is run with language='hi' or language='en'. The benchmark will evaluate romanized Hinglish (Variant A), mixed script Hinglish (Variant B), and translated pure Devanagari Hindi (Variant C) to determine the best input format for clear pronunciation.

cpu_inference.arguments: gpu=False in TTS class initialization forces CPU usage
cpu_inference.ram_requirements: ~4-6 GB peak memory usage during model loading and generation

voice_cloning_workflow.reference_wav_requirements: 3-10 second clip of clean, noise-free speech in WAV format, ideally at 22050Hz or 24000Hz sample rate
voice_cloning_workflow.conditioning: Passed as speaker_wav argument during text-to-speech generation

inference_code_example:
from TTS.api import TTS
tts = TTS('tts_models/multilingual/multi-dataset/xtts_v2', gpu=False)
tts.tts_to_file(
    text='Aaj hum Newton ke Laws of Motion ke baare mein padhenge.',
    speaker_wav='xtts_benchmark/reference/teacher_short.wav',
    language='hi',
    file_path='xtts_benchmark/outputs/test_hinglish.wav'
)
